headline: This is Why Newmont Corporation (NEM) is Goldman Sachs Top Gold Stock Pick
summary: Newmont Corporation (NYSE:NEM) is one of Goldman Sachs top gold stock picks. On April 23, Newmont Corporation (NYSE:NEM) delivered strong operational and financial results for the first quarter. During the quarter, the company produced 1.3 million attributable gold ounces and achieved a record $3.1 billion in quarterly free cash flow. Newmont Corporation (NYSE:NEM) is on […]

headline: Nemetschek Q1 Earnings Call Highlights
summary: Nemetschek (ETR:NEM) reported what management described as a “very successful” start to 2026, with first-quarter results supported by continued strength in its Build segment, a re-acceleration in Design, and expanding profitability. headline: Is It Too Late To Consider Newmont (NEM) After Its 107% One Year Rally?
summary: If you are wondering whether Newmont at around US$107.61 still offers value after a strong run, the next sections will walk through what the numbers actually say about the stock. The share price total return has been mixed in the short term, with a 3.8% decline over 7 days and a 4.4% gain over 30 days, while the year to date return is 6.3% and the 1 year return stands at 106.9%, with 3 year and 5 year returns of 143.9% and 92.8% respectively. Recent coverage has focused on Newmont's position...

headline: Are Wall Street Analysts Predicting Newmont Stock Will Climb or Sink?
summary: As Newmont has notably outperformed the broader market over the past year, Wall Street analysts maintain a highly optimistic outlook about the stock’s prospects.
